pi_items.source: Web search results from StubHub fee analysis articles and TickPick blog confirming buyers pay ~10% service fee on StubHub

Multiple sources confirm: TickPick article states 'Seller fees are more consistent at 15%', dicloak.com states 'approximately 15% of the final sale price', web search results consistently report 15% as standard StubHub seller fee

pi_items.verified_value: 10-20% range typical, with 15% more commonly reported
pi_items.source: Web search results show Ticketmaster fees range from 10% to 20%, with multiple sources mentioning 15% as the standard rate. No sources specifically confirmed 12% as a standard Ticketmaster selling fee rate.

pi_items.verified_value: 2.9% + 30¢ is standard industry rate for online card transactions
pi_items.source: Multiple payment processor sources (Square, Shopify, industry guides) confirm 2.9% + 30¢ is the standard online credit card processing fee, consistent with what major payment processors charge

pi_items.verified_value: Platforms mentioned are real ticket resale and payment platforms operating in 2024-2025
pi_items.source: Web searches confirm StubHub and Ticketmaster are active major ticket resale platforms; Venmo is a real payment app; Direct/Friend/Venue/Cash are general transaction types without standardized fees

pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic data created by setup_task.sh with 12 sample ticket transactions
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script contains hardcoded CSV data with sample transactions for Taylor Swift Floor Seats, NBA Finals, Broadway Hamilton, etc. This is not from any external public dataset.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic ticket transaction data created by setup_task.sh. Key fee structure claims verified: StubHub purchase fee of 10% matches typical buyer service fees reported in 2024-2025; StubHub 15% seller fee is confirmed as the standard commission. Ticketmaster 12% selling fee falls within industry range (10-20%) but is not confirmed as the standard rate—most sources report 15% as more typical. Payment processing fee of 2.9% is verified as the standard online credit card transaction rate. All platforms mentioned (StubHub, Ticketmaster, Venmo, etc.) are real and operational.
